chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-2158 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 24.03.2026 M/s Achar Khan Gabol and Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocates for petitioner Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for respondent No.4 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional A.G Sindh ************** Fazal Mangi, Superintendent Engineer, PHED Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo; Abhemeno, XEN, PHED Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo; and Tanveer Ahmed, ADC-I Ghotki, are present in person and undertake that the short-term grievance of the petitioner will be redressed within one week. However, they seek additional time to resolve the petitioner’s grievance once and for all. Upon such undertaking, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant constitutional petition. Accordingly, the instant constitutional petition stands disposed of with directions to the respondents to redress the grievance of the petitioner within a period of three months and to submit a compliance report to this Court. It is, however, made clear that in case of failure to redress the grievance of the petitioner as undertaken by the official respondents present in Court, the contempt proceedings shall be initiated against them in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
